L1.head: integration of dielectric gradient metamaterials with advanced 3D printing techniques
L1.tail: design and fabrication of THz metalenses
L1.claim: 整合使THz金属透镜的设计制造成为可能

L1.head: design and fabrication of THz metalenses
L1.tail: traditional limitations (chromatic aberrations, spherical aberrations, diffraction limit)
L1.claim: THz金属透镜克服了传统限制

L1.head: precise control of refractive index profile through 3D printing of high-aspect-ratio nano-pillar structures
L1.claim: 控制折射率分布实现了超分辨率参数

L1.head: super-resolution imaging
L1.tail: capabilities of THz imaging systems for applications
L1.claim: 超分辨率提升了THz系统的应用能力

L2.head: use of dielectric gradient metamaterials in THz metalens design
L2.claim: 介电梯度超材料缓解了色差

L2.head: use of dielectric gradient metamaterials
L2.claim: 介电梯度超材料实现了超分辨率成像

L2.head: precise control of subwavelength nano-scatterers
L2.claim: 控制散射体操纵THz波前相位

L2.head: manipulation of THz wavefront phase
L2.tail: chromatic dispersion across a broad frequency range
L2.claim: 操纵相位纠正了宽频色散

L2.head: advanced 3D printing technology
L2.tail: precise fabrication of complex nanostructures for THz metalenses
L2.claim: 3D打印技术使复杂纳米结构制造成为可能

L2.head: optimization of 3D printing parameters (layer thickness, material composition)
L2.tail: structural integrity and optical properties of metalenses
L2.claim: 参数优化改善了结构完整性和光学性质

L2.head: improved structural and optical properties
L2.tail: imaging resolution and reduces manufacturing costs
L2.claim: 改善的性质提升了分辨率并降低成本

L3.head: combination of dielectric gradient metamaterial design with 3D printing
L3.tail: THz metalenses with super-resolution and wide bandwidth efficiency
L3.claim: 整合设计实现了超分辨率和宽带效率

L3.head: alignment of phase distribution and refractive index profile during 3D printing
L3.claim: 对齐参数使超越阿贝衍射极限成为可能

L3.head: surpassing diffraction limit
L3.tail: visualization of submillimeter features with high precision
L3.claim: 超越极限实现了亚毫米特征的高精度可视化

L3.head: incorporation of high-aspect-ratio nano-pillar structures
L3.tail: numerical aperture (NA) and field of view (FOV)

L3.head: combination with super-surface technology
L3.claim: 超表面技术实现了同心纳米环结构

L3.head: concentric nano-ring structures
L3.claim: 同心环结构达到具体NA和FOV参数

L3.head: enhanced NA and FOV
L3.tail: broader and more detailed imaging capability
L3.claim: 提升的参数提供了更广的成像能力
